# kDADiskDescriptionMatchVolumeMountable | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Disk Arbitration ](/documentation/diskarbitration)

- [ kDADiskDescriptionMatchVolumeMountable ](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionmatchvolumemountable)

-  kDADiskDescriptionMatchVolumeMountable 

Global Variable# kDADiskDescriptionMatchVolumeMountable

Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.4+

```
var kDADiskDescriptionMatchVolumeMountable: Unmanaged<CFDictionary>
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionmatchvolumemountable#Discussion)

Predefined CFDictionary object containing a set of disk description keys and values appropriate for matching mountable volumes using DARegister*Callback().
